message:
fix(web): Fix bugs in status page implementation

- Fix NaN handling in incidents API when invalid limit param is passed
  - Previously parseInt("abc") would return NaN causing unpredictable behavior
  - Now properly defaults to 20 and clamps between 1-100

- Fix hardcoded "Recent Incidents" section in status page
  - Previously always showed "No recent incidents" regardless of data
  - Now fetches and displays up to 5 recently resolved incidents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
